summary.shape_sentence: Bullish trend day: volatile open, 10:00 flush, steady higher-low climb, afternoon compression, late upside squeeze, then closing pullback.

goat.note: No visible star label; inferred standout move was the upside drive from ~25,060 into ~25,265.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels; bearish pivots functionally appeared at the ~09:54 high, ~13:05 range high, and ~15:50 HOD rejection.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels; bullish pivots functionally appeared at the ~10:08 LOD, ~10:58 higher low, ~12:15 higher low, and ~15:05 higher low.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange bank icons; implied supply at ~25,190 was broken, ~25,335 capped early afternoon before breaking late, and ~25,425–25,435 rejected into close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue bank icons; implied demand at ~24,975–25,005 held after the 10:00 flush, and ~25,275–25,295 held during the afternoon.

time_markers.10am_blue: Price was rolling over from the first impulse high into the sharp morning flush.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was holding elevated after the morning recovery, consolidating above prior higher lows.
time_markers.2pm_green: Price was balanced in a tight upper range near ~25,300–25,320.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Session closed green near ~25,362.50 after a late HOD squeeze and pullback.

takeaway: Bullish trend day with a failed 10:00 breakdown, persistent higher-low structure, and late upside expansion. Comparable to sessions where early weakness becomes the day's demand base and afternoon compression resolves higher before closing pullback.
